mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message (user_id, content, create_time, state, parent_id, reply_user_id) VALUES (#{msg.userId}, #{msg.content}, #{msg.createTime}, #{msg.state}, #{msg.parentId}, #{msg.replyUserId})
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.user_id as userId, m.content, m.create_time as createTime, m.parent_id as parentId, m.reply_user_id as replyUserId, u.nickname, u.photo, ru.nickname as replyNickname FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user ru ON m.reply_user_id = ru.id WHERE m.state = 1 ORDER BY m.create_time DESC

SELECT m.id, m.user_id as userId, m.content, m.create_time as createTime, m.state, m.parent_id as parentId, m.reply_user_id as replyUserId, m.reject_reason as rejectReason, u.nickname, u.photo, ru.nickname as replyNickname FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user ru ON m.reply_user_id = ru.id WHERE m.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY m.create_time DESC
